abstracts.abstract: By Representative Luddy of Orleans and Senator Cyr, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4318) of Hadley Luddy and Julian Cyr (by vote of the town) for legislation to authorize the town of Harwich affordable housing trust to provide for the creation of attainable housing.  Housing.  [Local Approval Received.]

bill.title: An Act authorizing the town of Harwich affordable housing trust to provide for the creation of attainable housing

action.description: Read; and placed in the Orders of the Day for the next session
